arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher Urges Aston Villa to Sell £85M-Rated West Ham and PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly interested in Aston Villa forward Jhon Durán as they aim to bolster their attack with a long-term addition. Journalist Ben Jacobs has shared that PSG are keen on the Colombian striker, but a major challenge lies in Aston Villa’s £80 million valuation. arts.ttl: Liverpool on Alert as Neymar’s Exit Sparks Al-Hilal’s Push for PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is now free to start talks with other clubs as his contract with Liverpool expires in June. With the new year underway, reports have surfaced linking the 32-year-old forward to Paris Saint-Germain. L’Équipe’s Loïc Tanzi reveals that PSG are fully focused on securing Salah’s signature next summer.
